categories.description: Sent to tenant admins when a new custom AgeGroup is created. Distinct from AgeGroupCatalogSeeded — the seeded catalog fires silently (system invariant, not a purchase). Opt-in tier: functional_optional; default on for admins + owners.

Sent to tenant admins when min_age_inclusive OR max_age_inclusive changes on any AgeGroup. Cannot opt out — bounds changes may invalidate the eligibility of every downstream Athlete + Team, so admins must know. Includes { name, min_age (before, after), max_age (before, after), is_youth_flip, affected_athlete_count } — the last field populated from Wave 3+.

Sent to tenant admins when the is_default flag flips within a (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple. Cannot opt out — the default drives tier-pricing defaults for downstream referring rows (Finance Wave 4).
